# mtncloud_network_domain (Data Source)

Looks up an MTN Cloud network domain by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mtncloud_network_domain" "corp" {
  name = "corp.example.ng"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the network domain to look up.

### Read-Only

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the domain is active.
- `description` (String) Description of the network domain.
- `fqdn` (String) Fully qualified domain name.
- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the network domain.
- `visibility` (String) Visibility of the network domain.
